original_prompt: the user must first select the location that they want the appointment to be in in the modal. the system should calculate based on the previous or upcoming appointments if there are any scheduled ahead of time, that the travel distance duration is taken into account, the travel from appointment a to appointment b should have the slot/duration blocked on the appointment slot selection
rephrased_goal: Enforce location selection before showing time slots, and calculate travel times between consecutive appointments to block unreachable slots.
